pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-A-002 (AI and Machine Learning/Ability) scores 0.421 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.421) and is edge_case for the Statistician role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, O*NET signal (0.421), and AI and Machine Learning handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Statistical ML (Bayesian methods, regression, predictive modeling) in 40-60% of Statistician postings. Deep learning engineering is not a core Statistician competency.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Statistical ML (Bayesian methods, regression, predictive modeling) in 40-60% of Statistician postings. Final decision: exclude.
